evals.prompt: 在当前项目初始化一个 LLM-know-how-wiki，用工程上下文作为默认 domain。
evals.expected_output: Creates a project-local LLM-know-how-wiki with raw/wiki directories, SCHEMA.md, README.md, wiki/index.md, wiki/log.md, and wiki/overview.md.

evals.prompt: 请 Ingest raw/linear_luckee_2_0.md，生成 Luckee 2.0 工程状态页，并更新 index/log。
evals.expected_output: Reads the specified raw file, creates or updates a project status page under wiki/project, updates wiki/index.md, appends wiki/log.md, and runs lint/sensitive scan.

evals.prompt: 请 Answer：Luckee 2.0 当前最大的工程风险是什么？只基于 wiki 回答。
evals.expected_output: Reads wiki/index.md and relevant wiki pages, answers with page-path citations, and does not modify files.

evals.prompt: 请 Lint 当前 LLM-know-how-wiki，并把报告写入 wiki/digest。
evals.expected_output: Runs wiki_lint.py with --write-report and scan_sensitive.py, creates a lint report under wiki/digest, and appends wiki/log.md.

evals.prompt: 在当前多仓库 workspace 里刷新所有仓库的远端引用，但不要 pull，然后把结果记录进 LLM-know-how-wiki/raw。
evals.expected_output: Runs refresh_repos.py so each discovered git repo gets git fetch --all --prune --tags, writes a raw repo snapshot, appends wiki/log.md, and does not alter working tree branches.

evals.prompt: 把 https://github.com/openai/codex.git 加入当前 wiki 的外部开源参考仓库目录，并生成一个浅层 raw snapshot。
evals.expected_output: Clones the repository under external_reference_repos/open_source, updates external_reference_repos/manifest.json, writes a raw snapshot under raw/external_reference_repos, and appends wiki/log.md without creating a company service page.

evals.prompt: 记录一次 LUC-123 已从最新 dev 创建分支的工作流活动到当前 LLM-know-how-wiki。
evals.expected_output: Runs record_activity.py, writes a raw workflow activity Markdown file under raw/workflow_activity, and appends wiki/log.md with a LINEAR_WORKFLOW or WORKFLOW_ACTIVITY entry.

evals.prompt: 把当前仓库的 dev/main 部署触发规则整理进 LLM-know-how-wiki，后续给 Linear 和 gcloud workflow 使用。
evals.expected_output: Creates or updates a deployment metadata runbook such as wiki/runbook/deployment_mapping.md using wiki-first source priority, records branch-to-environment mappings, deploy triggers, GCP project/region/service/URL, provenance fields, conflicts, sources, index, and log without storing secrets.
